caption: The video captures a scene from a sports stadium, focusing on a large digital scoreboard. The scoreboard prominently displays the logo of "Winamax" on the left side and the emblem of "Caja Rural Granada" on the right. In the center, there is a close-up image of a red and white striped jersey with the letters "VCF" visible, indicating it might be related to Valencia CF, a Spanish football club. The background shows an empty stadium with rows of red seats and some buildings outside the venue. The sky above is partly cloudy, suggesting it might be late afternoon or early evening. The overall atmosphere suggests preparation for a sporting event, possibly a football match.
